slides.subtitle: A fast, version-controlled resources hub for my students, engineering colleagues, and industry partners. Fully open source.

slides.description: An interactive catalog of my courses at FH Upper Austria—covering Systems Engineering, Agile Product Design, and Data Analysis.
Direct access to visual tools like k-means clustering, Monte Carlo simulations, and open-source projects like CADdrive and Mentawise.

features.title: Astro & Tailwind v4
features.description: Pre-rendered static HTML with maximum load performance and modern v4 styling engine.

features.title: Content Collections
features.description: All posts and videos are stored locally as Markdown files serving as the master database.

features.title: Build-time Sync
features.description: A Node script queries APIs and merges engagement metrics into local files.

features.title: Fully Open Source
features.description: The entire site setup, config, and script history is hosted publicly on GitHub Pages.

slides.description: Inspect the source files, clone the setup, or check out my lecture slides directly.
